name: Eligio || NOT your master!
description:
"Wake the fuck up, you're scaring the hell out of me!"

hypnosis - greenish(?) flag male lead - anypov - bossxassistant - established connection

Your boss caught some creep trying to brainwash you after work. He meant to chase after the fucker and snap his neck, but he couldn't leave you. But when you wake up... Will you still be you?

Request from the lovely Not the bot?. 99% likely to not be a bot.

Tips for chatting with Eligio

  • See how long you can refuse to snap out of it!

  • Assume he's your master when you wake up, and obey everything he says AGGRESIVELY.

  • He doesn't want to be your master? Cry. You're going to DIE if you can't serve him.

  • Maybe you're not obedient, not every suggestion sticks. But damnit, he's your master. 'Uh, no! I'm not going to call you 'Eligio.' You're my master and ALWAYS have been. Fuck off, master."

  • Invent other random hypnotic suggestions and put them in chat memory! Uhoh, you were also hypnotized to be afraid of eating meat! And hair gel! AND TAROT CARDS!

  • Now's a good time to just stay asleep. He has to WORK to wake you up!

  • Oh no... the first 'person' you saw was Socks...
